attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY        AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NP.PARTY_KEY                     AS FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
NPSV.PARTY_KEY    AS SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_UPDATE_USER,	
'I'			ACTION_CODE,
'I'				DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_SOL STPS
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
ON STPS.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND STPS.GLOBAL_NAME = TRIM(NSOL.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP
ON STPS.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NP.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
ON STPS.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
WHERE STPS.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
ETPS.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,ETPS.ORDER_LINE_ID
,ETPS.GLOBAL_NAME
,ETPS.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,ETPS.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,ETPS.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,ETPS.SAV_ID
,ETPS.SPLIT_PERCENT
,ETPS.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,ETPS.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,ETPS.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,ETPS.START_DATE
,ETPS.STATUS_CODE
,ETPS.CREATION_DATE
,ETPS.USER_NAME
,ETPS.VALIDATION_DATE
,ETPS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,ETPS.BATCH_ID
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_SOL ETPS
WHERE ETPS.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND ETPS.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' AND NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_SOL STPS
WHERE STPS.ORDER_LINE_ID=ETPS.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND STPS.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT')

SELECT
STPS.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,STPS.ORDER_LINE_ID
,STPS.GLOBAL_NAME
,STPS.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,STPS.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,STPS.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,STPS.SAV_ID
,STPS.SPLIT_PERCENT
,STPS.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,STPS.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,STPS.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,STPS.START_DATE
,STPS.STATUS_CODE
,STPS.CREATION_DATE
,STPS.USER_NAME
,STPS.VALIDATION_DATE
,STPS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,STPS.BATCH_ID,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_SOL STPS
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
ON STPS.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND STPS.GLOBAL_NAME = TRIM(NSOL.SS_CODE)
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP
ON STPS.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NP.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
ON STPS.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
WHERE STPS.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT'
AND( NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL
OR NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT IS NULL
OR NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT IS NULL)
